summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Eunoia platform features. Backend APIs working at 100% success rate with all enhanced features functional. Frontend core features verified with some navigation limitations due to authentication requirements.

integration_issues.issue: Login button not consistently visible on landing page, requires navigation through 'See how it works'

passed_tests: Enhanced signup with India locale and Medical Resident role selection
43-question assessment across 6 sections (PHQ-9: 9, GAD-7: 7, PSS-10: 10, PSQI: 8, MBI: 6, UCLA-3: 3)
Assessment submission generates profile with 5 score bars including sleep_score
Crisis moderation check returns 'paused_crisis' for suicide-related text
Crisis helplines for IN locale (Tele-MANAS, iCall, Vandrevala Foundation)
Wellness Profile displays all 5 score bars (anxiety, stress, sleep disruption, loneliness, burnout)
Forum posts show display names instead of Anonymous (Resident_3847, Intern_0933, Dr_1847)
Gamified assessment with section intros and themed chapters
Crisis guardrail properly blocks and logs crisis content
Enhanced assessment scoring with PSS-10 and PSQI scales
Profile generation from assessment with 5 dimensional scores
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving login button visibility on landing page for better user experience. All enhanced features are working correctly.
